title: Eighth cortex
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''eighth cortex''' was supposedly the final level of [[shaping protocol]]s available to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Only the [[Supreme Overlord]] knew what was in the eighth cortex, and saw fit as to when he should distribute the information to the [[Shaper caste]]. Through the Supreme Overlord the [[Yun'o|gods]] of the Yuuzhan Vong supposedly dispensed the protocols.

In reality, by the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the eighth cortex was still empty. There were no new protocols explaining how to defeat the tenacious, versatile infidels who populated [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The [[Shaper caste|shaper]] [[Onimi]] had seen this and had sought to fill the eighth cortex. His experiments failed, transforming him into a Shamed One. He manipulated his puppet [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] into allowing the heretic [[Nen Yim]] to design new protocols herself. The [[damutek]] of the eighth cortex was located on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. As the war continued, heresy among the shapers spread, as the [[yammosk]] jammers, holocomm networks and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] proved problematic.

The discovery that the eighth cortex was and had always been empty was one of the factors contributing to the [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]] [[Nom Anor]] becoming the [[Jeedai heresy|heretic]] prophet [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]].
